title: Engineering and Health Sciences Working Group
content:
Engineering and Health Sciences Working Group

Research Focus

It aims to develop technologies that support human health. These technologies include modeling of brain electrophysiology and tumor growth, drug repositioning applications, the use of phytochemicals in the field of health, the creation of healthy cell models or disease models with tissue engineering and the study of their usage areas.
